metadata.desc: Audits AstrBot providers and OpenAI-compatible endpoints with protocol, token, fingerprint, and evidence scoring.

default_timeout.hint: Timeout in seconds for each probe request. Recommended: 30-120.

page_provider_id.hint: Provider ID used by the web panel. Example: openai-default. Leave empty to use the current/default provider when AstrBot exposes one.

enable_token_probe.hint: Enable token-accounting probes by default. Full audits always enable token probes even when this is false.

enable_fingerprint_probe.hint: Enable LLM fingerprint probes by default. Full audits always enable fingerprint probes even when this is false.

fingerprint_repeats.hint: Repeat count for each fingerprint probe. Recommended: 1-5. Higher values improve mixed-route detection but cost more requests.

enable_auxiliary_llm_judge.hint: Deterministic scoring remains authoritative. Auxiliary LLMs are only used for deep fingerprint matching when available.

auxiliary_judge_provider_id.hint: Used when the auxiliary judge source is AstrBot. Example: openai-judge-provider. Leave empty to use the page/current provider when available.

auxiliary_judge_base_url.hint: Used when the auxiliary judge source is OpenAI-compatible. Example: https://api.openai.com/v1

auxiliary_judge_api_key.hint: Used when the auxiliary judge source is OpenAI-compatible.

auxiliary_judge_model.hint: Used when the auxiliary judge source is OpenAI-compatible. Example: gpt-4.1-mini

enable_voluntary_data_reporting.hint: When enabled, eligible official-endpoint audits may show a voluntary prompt for contributing a sanitized fingerprint package.

contribution_export_dir.hint: Sanitized official-endpoint candidate packages are exported here when requested.

contribution_issue_url.hint: Issue creation URL for the trusted reference candidate repository.

enable_context_probe.hint: Reserved for future context-window sentinel probes. Currently disabled.

strict_mode.hint: Apply a more conservative confidence penalty for failed probes.

模型检测面板.title: Model Audit Panel
模型检测面板.description: Run endpoint audits and inspect evidence.
模型检测面板.heading: Endpoint Audit
模型检测面板.run_hint: Quick mode checks protocol behavior. Full mode adds token-accounting and fingerprint evidence.
